description: Create a content slide on the link between technological innovation and prosperity with a two-column layout, featuring a scatter chart of Global Innovation Index vs GDP per capita and a right-side explanatory text panel.

header.headline: Technological innovation and prosperity are highly interconnected – Lack of either factor is mutually disadvantageous
header.sub: Global Innovation Index related to GDP per capita PPP, 2019¹) [USD]

items.text: Explanatory callout text panel summarizing the relationship between innovation and prosperity
